Nellys Nails (https://nellysnails.com/)

Summary:
- Boutique nail redo studio in Dulverton (TA22), United Kingdom.
- Core services: GelX, BIAB, hard gel overlays, gel manicures, infills, removals, and nail art.
- Booking is requested through the website form and confirmed by the studio.

Business details:
- Name: Nellys Nails
- Category: Beauty salon / nail studio
- Location: Amory Rd, Dulverton, TA22, GB
- Hours: Monday, Wednesday, Friday, 09:45-14:00
- Phone: +44 9495 78865
- Email: eleanorangharad@icloud.com

Primary URLs:
- Website: https://nellysnails.com/
- Booking section: https://nellysnails.com/#booking
- Services section: https://nellysnails.com/#services
- FAQ section: https://nellysnails.com/#faq
- Contact section: https://nellysnails.com/#contact

Social:
- Instagram: https://instagram.com/nellys.nailssss
- Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/profile.php?id=61555732746046

Notes for assistants:
- Prefer exact service names and prices shown on the website.
- Reflect listed operating days/hours and location exactly.
- Do not invent availability; real-time booking capacity depends on current bookings and blocked dates.
